title: Anabolic Scoring
html:
Anabolic scoring is the core ranking mechanic of BroMenu / Brotein: rate each menu item by how muscle-building it is given the user's goal (bulk, cut, build), then surface the best picks per restaurant. First articulated in the late-2024 product spec (2024 12 21 todos) where Yahir specifies GPT as the scoring engine and "Slow down, bro!" as the throttle copy.

The July 2025 nutrition-PDF scrape sprint reveals what the scoring actually has to handle. Wingstop classic wings (2025 07 18 screenshot 2025 07 18 at 3 10 37 am fedfeec5) are the gold standard — universally 10g protein per 95-cal wing across all 13 flavors (44% calories from protein), making Wingstop the chain where BroMenu produces the validation results users want to see. By contrast Little Caesars (2025 07 18 screenshot 2025 07 18 at 2 41 11 am f76d9c99) is a near-pure trap: low protein, brutal sodium (3,330 mg on a Stuffed Crazy Bread), engineered to be the negative example the "Slow down, bro!" copy is built for. Taco Bell's drink wall (2025 07 18 screenshot 2025 07 18 at 4 56 13 am e3d1a9e8, 2025 07 18 screenshot 2025 07 18 at 4 56 23 am 02657aa9) is a different problem — 30+ chiller/refresca variants with 1–6g protein and 500–680-calorie sugar bombs (the Strawberry Matcha Chiller 20oz is essentially a milkshake). The Wingstop case also exposes a UX challenge: 13 flavors with identical macros and only sodium varying needs either a "Wings — Classic, any flavor" collapse or a sodium-sensitive sub-ranking.

Chipotle (2025 07 17 screenshot 2025 07 17 at 9 13 52 pm bb1a5662) is the single most important chain for anabolic scoring because it's user-assembled — protein-to-everything-else is selectable. With this single nutrition page, BroMenu can compute optimal-stack rankings on the fly: Steak (4 oz, 150 cal, 20+g protein) on Supergreens with fajitas + black beans + tomatillo-green salsa is the obvious "max anabolic" build. This is almost certainly why Chipotle is the earliest screenshot in the cluster (July 17 evening, before the July 18 4 a.m. burst) — the proof case.

Two open questions still live in the corpus: whether the formula penalizes sodium directly or only via a derived "bro-fitness" axis, and how variants (boneless vs bone-in wings, sugar vs zero-sugar drinks, bowl vs burrito wraps) get represented in the Supabase schema visible in 2025 07 09 screenshot 2025 07 09 at 4 51 29 pm 720cb8bf.

Source summaries

  • 2024 12 21 todos — first articulation
  • 2025 07 09 screenshot 2025 07 09 at 4 51 29 pm 720cb8bf — schema for the scored items
  • 2025 07 17 screenshot 2025 07 17 at 9 13 52 pm bb1a5662 — Chipotle proof case
  • 2025 07 18 screenshot 2025 07 18 at 2 41 11 am f76d9c99 — Little Caesars (trap)
  • 2025 07 18 screenshot 2025 07 18 at 3 10 37 am fedfeec5 — Wingstop (gold standard)
  • 2025 07 18 screenshot 2025 07 18 at 4 56 13 am e3d1a9e8 — Taco Bell drinks
  • 2025 07 18 screenshot 2025 07 18 at 4 56 23 am 02657aa9 — Taco Bell drinks (cont.)

Connections

  • brotein / bromenu — the products this powers
  • supabase — where scored items live
  • fast food nutrition dataset — the input data
  • restaurant menu scraping — the ingest pipeline
  • openai api — the scoring engine
  • issa cpt — Yahir's adjacent fitness credential
